sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82363" key="peri/thgma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περί-τηγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n82363.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is cast off in smelting, dross, scum</tr_>: metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἰσοτιμίας π. ἡ εὐγένεια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.85</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
